mapper.select: SELECT r.role_name FROM ai_agent_roles ar INNER JOIN ai_roles r ON r.id = ar.role_id WHERE ar.agent_code = #{agentCode} ORDER BY r.role_name ASC

SELECT CONCAT(d.agent_name, ' (', d.agent_code, ')') FROM ai_agent_roles ar INNER JOIN ai_agent_definitions d ON d.agent_code = ar.agent_code WHERE ar.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC, d.agent_code ASC LIMIT 10
